raw_consumer_statement:
The company charged me from last year as I reported that the card was lost in mail. 
I am requesting them to provide me compelling evidence/documents as I must present this with my lawyer that the chargeback to prove the transaction was valid or otherwise contradict the chargeback as I reported to them that my card was stolen and compromised. 
Attached is a police report that our mail was stolen. 
I am a victim of identity theft, and I did not make or authorize this charge. 
I am requesting that the charge be removed, that any finance and other charges related to the fraudulent amount be credited, as well, and that I receive an accurate statement.
